summary: Completed backend and frontend testing for iteration 14: Booking policy redesign. Fixed missing cancellation_days field in backend business_doc. All 14 features tested and passed.

fixed.issue: cancellation_days field was not being saved to database
fixed.fix: Added 'cancellation_days': business.cancellation_days to business_doc in register_business function (server.py line ~1095)

passed_tests: Backend: Registration with requires_deposit=true correctly stores cancellation_days
Backend: Registration with requires_deposit=false correctly stores cancellation_days
Backend: Default cancellation_days is 1 when not provided
Frontend: Step 4 'Cuenta y pago' shows booking policy section
Frontend: Option 1 'Requiero anticipo' exists with data-testid='option-with-deposit'
Frontend: Option 2 'No requiero anticipo' exists with data-testid='option-without-deposit'
Frontend: Default selection is 'No requiero anticipo' (requires_deposit=false)
Frontend: Deposit amount field (data-testid='deposit-amount-input') appears when 'With deposit' selected
Frontend: Cancellation days field (data-testid='cancellation-days-deposit-input') appears when 'With deposit' selected
Frontend: Cancellation days field (data-testid='cancellation-days-no-deposit-input') appears when 'No deposit' selected
Frontend: Help icon data-testid='help-deposit-amount' exists and shows popover
Frontend: Help icon data-testid='help-cancellation-deposit' exists and shows popover
Frontend: Help icon data-testid='help-cancellation-no-deposit' exists and shows popover
Frontend: Home page (/) still works correctly
Frontend: Business profile page (/business/test-business-5ecc65fc) still works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested the booking policy redesign in the business registration form. Key data-testids: option-with-deposit, option-without-deposit, deposit-amount-input, cancellation-days-deposit-input, cancellation-days-no-deposit-input, help-deposit-amount, help-cancellation-deposit, help-cancellation-no-deposit. Backend fix applied: cancellation_days field was not being saved to business_doc - now fixed in server.py. The form is multi-step with file upload required at Step 3. Test businesses created: TEST_Spa With Deposit, TEST_Spa No Deposit, TEST_Spa Default. App URL: https://marketplace-test-21.preview.emergentagent.com
rca_of_the_issue: Bug found: cancellation_days field was defined in BusinessCreate model (line 279) and BusinessResponse model (line 311) but was NOT being saved to the MongoDB document in the register_business function. The fix was adding 'cancellation_days': business.cancellation_days to the business_doc dictionary at line ~1095.
